testcase.name: DocumentImporter > renders the dropzone with the file input and format badges
DocumentImporter > shows analyzing state immediately after picking a file
DocumentImporter > shows ready state with chapter count after successful analysis
DocumentImporter > shows generic error when the API returns IMPORT_FAILED
DocumentImporter > shows unsupported format error when the API returns FORMAT_UNSUPPORTED
DocumentImporter > shows file too large error before calling the API when file exceeds 50 MB
DocumentImporter > shows generic error on network failure
PreviewCanvas > renders a dedicated title page first for imported documents
PreviewCanvas > renders imported HTML blocks with headings and list items after advancing page
PreviewCanvas > splits long index content across multiple pages instead of squeezing it into one
PreviewCanvas > renders preview controls with stable data-testid attributes
ProjectWorkspace > renders the project title in the header
ProjectWorkspace > renders the chapter organizer with all chapter titles
ProjectWorkspace > shows first chapter content in the editor by default
ProjectWorkspace > switches to the second chapter when clicked
ProjectWorkspace > shows links to preview and cover
ProjectWorkspace > renders chapter management controls in the organizer
project factories > creates a canonical project with editor, preview, and cover state
project factories > updates document blocks while preserving the project structure
project factories > updates cover metadata and background references
project factories > creates a project seeded from an imported document
project factories > creates a project seeded from multiple imported chapters and default editorial metadata
project factories > moves and deletes chapters while preserving document consistency
document import parser isolation > docx import does not load the pdf parser
document import parser isolation > builds multiple chapters from markdown headings
document import parser isolation > docx import prefers mammoth html extraction for chapter-aware parsing
document import parser isolation > structural h1 day headings become independent chapters while index entries do not
document import parser isolation > markdown without explicit index generates an editable synthetic index after prologue when chapters exist
